# Application interface and data entry patterns (2025-12-19 00:55Z)

_**User**_

1. Sidebar: Collapsible, when collapsed just icons should be shown, 

2. Header: Some extra actions of license state(gradient animated progress with labels), Online/Offline state(icons), user name(full name with rule), logo, branding identity etc...

3. In header

4.My main focus is data entry more than visualling for most of pages and screens of my app, so i think using both these tow options will be great. 

Option 1: The "IDE" Pattern

Inspiration: VS Code, Outlook, or Xcode.

This is the most robust pattern for complex system configuration. It treats your school data like a "project."

Layout:

Left Sidebar (Explorer): A tree view hierarchy.

Configuration

Teachers (Folder) -> List of Teachers

Classes (Folder) -> Grade 7 -> Class 7A

Main Stage (Tabs): When you click a teacher, it opens a Tab. You can have "Class 7A" and "Teacher Ahmad" open side-by-side to compare availability.

Right Panel (Inspector): Context-aware details. If you click a "Subject" in the main stage, the right panel shows its specific constraints (Room requirements, etc.) without leaving the view.

Why it works: It allows non-linear workflows. You can jump from fixing a class constraint to editing a teacher's profile instantly without hitting "Back" or losing your place.

Option 2: The "Airtable" / Data Grid Pattern

Inspiration: Excel, Airtable, Notion Databases.

If your users are data entry clerks or administrators, they hate forms. They hate clicking "Edit > Save > Close" 50 times for 50 teachers.

Layout:

Navigation: Simple tabs on top or left (Teachers, Classes, Rooms).

Main View: Editable Spreadsheets.

Interaction:

Don't make a "Create Teacher" form. Just have a blank row at the bottom of the grid.

"Monday Availability" isn't a dropdown; it's a cell you click to toggle.

"Qualified Subjects" is a multi-select tag cell.

Why it works: Speed. A user can configure 30 teachers in 5 minutes using keyboard navigation (Tab/Enter), whereas a Wizard/Form approach would take 30 minutes. For an Enterprise/Market-ready app, this is the highest value feature.

<details><summary>Tool use: **edit_file_v2** • Edit file: /home/ahmadi/Projects/maktab/packages/web/src/components/layout/Workspace.tsx</summary>

```typescriptreact
import React, { useState } from 'react';
import { useUIStore } from '@/stores/uiStore';
import { DataGrid, Column } from '@/components/ui/data-grid/DataGrid';

// Mock Data Generators
const MOCK_TEACHERS = [
  { id: '1', name: 'Ahmad', subject: ['Math', 'Physics'], maxHours: '24', active: true },
  { id: '2', name: 'Sarah', subject: ['English'], maxHours: '20', active: true },
  { id: '3', name: 'Mahmood', subject: ['History', 'Geography'], maxHours: '22', active: false },
];

const MOCK_CLASSES = [
  { id: '1', name: '7-A', grade: '7', room: '101', students: '32' },
  { id: '2', name: '7-B', grade: '7', room: '102', students: '30' },
  { id: '3', name: '8-A', grade: '8', room: '201', students: '35' },
];

const DataView = ({ type }: { type: string }) => {
  // In a real app, this would come from TanStack Query
  const [teachers, setTeachers] = useState(MOCK_TEACHERS);
  const [classes, setClasses] = useState(MOCK_CLASSES);

  if (type === 'teacher') {
    const columns: Column[] = [
      { id: 'name', title: 'Full Name', type: 'text', width: '250px' },
      { id: 'subject', title: 'Qualified Subjects', type: 'tags', width: '300px' },
      { id: 'maxHours', title: 'Max Hours', type: 'text', width: '100px' },
      { id: 'active', title: 'Active', type: 'boolean', width: '80px' },
    ];
    return (
      <div className="h-full p-4">
        <div className="mb-4">
          <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold tracking-tight">Teachers</h2>
          <p className="text-muted-foreground">Manage teacher profiles and qualifications.</p>
        </div>
        <div className="h-[calc(100%-80px)]">
          <DataGrid columns={columns} data={teachers} onDataChange={setTeachers} />
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  if (type === 'class') {
    const columns: Column[] = [
      { id: 'name', title: 'Class Name', type: 'text' },
      { id: 'grade', title: 'Grade Level', type: 'select', options: ['7', '8', '9', '10', '11', '12'] },
      { id: 'room', title: 'Home Room', type: 'text' },
      { id: 'students', title: 'Students', type: 'text' },
    ];
    return (
      <div className="h-full p-4">
         <div className="mb-4">
          <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold tracking-tight">Classes</h2>
          <p className="text-muted-foreground">Configure class groups and grades.</p>
        </div>
        <div className="h-[calc(100%-80px)]">
          <DataGrid columns={columns} data={classes} onDataChange={setClasses} />
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  return (
    <div className="p-8 flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-muted-foreground h-full">
      <h3 className="text-xl font-semibold mb-2">View: {type}</h3>
      <p>Data grid configuration not yet implemented for this type.</p>
    </div>
  );
};

const DashboardView = () => (
  <div className="p-6 grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6 animate-in fade-in duration-500">
    <div className="bg-card p-6 rounded-lg border shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow">
      <h3 className="font-semibold mb-2 text-muted-foreground text-sm uppercase">Total Teachers</h3>
      <div className="text-4xl font-bold text-primary">42</div>
      <div className="text-xs text-muted-foreground mt-2 text-green-600 font-medium">+2 this week</div>
    </div>
    <div className="bg-card p-6 rounded-lg border shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow">
      <h3 className="font-semibold mb-2 text-muted-foreground text-sm uppercase">Active Classes</h3>
      <div className="text-4xl font-bold text-primary">12</div>
      <div className="text-xs text-muted-foreground mt-2">Grades 7-12</div>
    </div>
    <div className="bg-card p-6 rounded-lg border shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow">
      <h3 className="font-semibold mb-2 text-muted-foreground text-sm uppercase">Constraints</h3>
      <div className="text-4xl font-bold text-primary">840</div>
      <div className="text-xs text-muted-foreground mt-2">Hard & Soft constraints</div>
    </div>
  </div>
);

export const Workspace = () => {
  const { tabs, activeTabId } = useUIStore();
  const activeTab = tabs.find(t => t.id === activeTabId);

  if (!activeTab) {
    return (
      <div className="flex-1 flex items-center justify-center bg-muted/10 text-muted-foreground">
        Select an item from the sidebar to get started
      </div>
    );
  }

  return (
    <div className="flex-1 overflow-hidden bg-background relative flex flex-col">
      {activeTab.type === 'dashboard' ? (
        <div className="flex-1 overflow-auto">
           <DashboardView />
        </div>
      ) : (
        <DataView type={activeTab.type} />
      )}
    </div>
  );
};

```

</details>

</tool-use>

The "IDE" Pattern UI overhaul has been implemented.

### Summary of Changes

1.  **UI Store (`stores/uiStore.ts`)**: Added state management for the IDE workspace, including `tabs`, `activeTabId`, `sidebarOpen`, and `rightPanelOpen`.
2.  **Header (`components/layout/Header.tsx`)**: Implemented the specified header with:
    *   **License Widget**: Animated gradient progress bar.
    *   **Status**: Online/Offline indicator.
    *   **User Profile**: Avatar and role display.
3.  **Sidebar (`components/layout/Sidebar.tsx`)**: Created a collapsible sidebar with a tree-view structure for navigation (Teachers, Classes, Rooms).
4.  **Main Stage (`components/layout/Workspace.tsx` & `TabBar.tsx`)**: Built the tabbed workspace area.
    *   **TabBar**: Manages open tabs.
    *   **Workspace**: Dynamically renders content based on the active tab type.
5.  **Data Grid (`components/ui/data-grid/DataGrid.tsx`)**: Implemented a high-performance, editable data grid for rapid data entry, featuring:
    *   Inline editing (Text, Select, Boolean/Checkbox, Tags).
    *   Keyboard navigation support (Enter to save).
    *   "Add Row" functionality.
6.  **Layout Integration (`components/layout/MainLayout.tsx`)**: Assembled all components into a responsive IDE-style shell and updated the root route (`routes/__root.tsx`) to use this new layout.

You can now start the development server to see the new interface. The application will default to the Dashboard view, and clicking items in the sidebar (e.g., "All Teachers", "Grade 7") will open new tabs with the editable data grid.

---

If you\nneed to generate manually:\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\nnpx @tanstack/router-cli generate\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### 4. Start Building Features\n\nNow you can start building:\n\n- Feature modules in &#96;src/features/&#96;\n- Layout components in &#96;src/components/layout/&#96;\n- Schedule components in &#96;src/components/schedule/&#96;\n- Custom hooks in &#96;src/hooks/&#96;\n\n## Troubleshooting\n\n### TypeScript Errors\n\nIf you see TypeScript errors about missing types:\n\n1. Make sure &#96;npm install&#96; completed successfully\n2. Restart TypeScript server: &#96;Ctrl+Shift+P&#96; → \"TypeScript: Restart TS Server\"\n\n### Vite Not Starting\n\n- Check that port 5173 is available\n- Verify Node.js version is 18+\n- Check for syntax errors in config files\n\n### Tailwind Not Working\n\n- Ensure &#96;tailwindcss&#96; is installed\n- Check &#96;tailwind.config.ts&#96; exists\n- Verify &#96;postcss.config.js&#96; exists\n- Check that &#96;globals.css&#96; imports Tailwind directives\n\n### TanStack Router Errors\n\n- Route tree will be auto-generated on first run\n- If you see route errors, run: &#96;npx @tanstack/router-cli generate&#96;\n\n## Development Workflow\n\n1. **Create a new route:**\n\n   - Add file in &#96;src/routes/&#96; (e.g., &#96;src/routes/about.tsx&#96;)\n   - Route tree auto-generates\n   - Access at &#96;/about&#96;\n\n2. **Create a feature:**\n\n   - Create directory in &#96;src/features/&#96; (e.g., &#96;src/features/teachers/&#96;)\n   - Add components, hooks, types, etc.\n   - Import using &#96;@/features/teachers/...&#96;\n\n3. **Add a UI component:**\n\n   - Use shadcn/ui pattern (see &#96;src/components/ui/button.tsx&#96;)\n   - Place in &#96;src/components/ui/&#96;\n   - Export from &#96;src/components/ui/index.ts&#96; (create if needed)\n\n4. **Use API:**\n\n   - Import from &#96;@/lib/api&#96;\n   - Use with TanStack Query:\n\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;typescript\n   import { useQuery } from '@tanstack/react-query';\n   import { api } from '@/lib/api';\n\n   const { data } = useQuery({\n     queryKey: ['teachers'],\n     queryFn: () =&gt; api.teachers.list(),\n   });\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n## Testing\n\nWhen you're ready to add tests:\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\nnpm install -D vitest @testing-library/react @testing-library/jest-dom\n&#96;&#96;&#96;",

```json
            "text": "3. **Add a UI component:**",
            "lineNumber": 150
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 151
          },
          {
            "text": "   - Use shadcn/ui pattern (see &#96;src/components/ui/button.tsx&#96;)",
            "lineNumber": 152
          },
          {
            "text": "   - Place in &#96;src/components/ui/&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 153
          },
          {
            "text": "   - Export from &#96;src/components/ui/index.ts&#96; (create if needed)",
            "lineNumber": 154
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 155
          },
          {
            "text": "4. **Use API:**",
            "lineNumber": 156
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 157
          },
          {
            "text": "   - Import from &#96;@/lib/api&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 158
          },
          {
            "text": "   - Use with TanStack Query:",
            "lineNumber": 159
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 160
          },
          {
            "text": "   &#96;&#96;&#96;typescript",
            "lineNumber": 161
          },
          {
            "text": "   import { useQuery } from '@tanstack/react-query';",
            "lineNumber": 162
          },
          {
            "text": "   import { api } from '@/lib/api';",
            "lineNumber": 163
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 164
          },
          {
            "text": "   const { data } = useQuery({",
            "lineNumber": 165
          },
          {
            "text": "     queryKey: ['teachers'],",
            "lineNumber": 166
          },
          {
            "text": "     queryFn: () =&gt; api.teachers.list(),",
            "lineNumber": 167
          },
          {
            "text": "   });",
            "lineNumber": 168
          },
          {
            "text": "   &#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 169
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 170
          },
          {
            "text": "## Testing",
            "lineNumber": 171
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 172
          },
          {
            "text": "When you're ready to add tests:",
            "lineNumber": 173
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 174
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;bash",
            "lineNumber": 175
          },
          {
            "text": "npm install -D vitest @testing-library/react @testing-library/jest-dom",
            "lineNumber": 176
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 177
          }
        ]
      },

        "contents": "import { createRootRoute, Outlet } from '@tanstack/react-router';\nimport { TanStackRouterDevtools } from '@tanstack/router-devtools';\n\nexport const Route = createRootRoute({\n  component: () =&gt; (\n    &lt;&gt;\n      &lt;MainLayout /&gt;\n      {/*\n        We keep Outlet here to satisfy the router structure,\n        even though our custom IDE layout manages the main view via tabs.\n        In a full implementation, we might sync tabs with routes.\n      */}\n      &lt;div className=\"hidden\"&gt;\n        &lt;Outlet /&gt;\n      &lt;/div&gt;\n      {import.meta.env.DEV &amp;&amp; &lt;TanStackRouterDevtools /&gt;}\n    &lt;/&gt;\n  ),\n});",

      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./packages/web/SETUP.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {},
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 99

        "contents": "# Frontend Setup Instructions\n\n## Quick Start\n\n1. **Install Dependencies**\n\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;bash\n   cd packages/web\n   npm install\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n2. **Set Up Environment Variables**\n\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;bash\n   cp .env.example .env\n   # Edit .env if needed (defaults should work)\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n3. **Generate TanStack Router Route Tree**\n\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;bash\n   # This will be done automatically by TanStack Router\n   # But you can run manually if needed:\n   npx @tanstack/router-cli generate\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n4. **Start Development Server**\n\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;bash\n   npm run dev\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n   The app will be available at &#96;http://localhost:5173&#96;\n\n## What's Already Set Up\n\n✅ **Configuration Files**\n\n- &#96;package.json&#96; - All dependencies configured\n- &#96;tsconfig.json&#96; - TypeScript with path aliases\n- &#96;vite.config.ts&#96; - Vite with React plugin\n- &#96;tailwind.config.ts&#96; - Tailwind CSS 4 with Naqsh design system\n- &#96;.eslintrc.json&#96; - ESLint for React/TypeScript\n- &#96;.prettierrc.json&#96; - Code formatting (inherited from root)\n\n✅ **Project Structure**\n\n- Basic directory structure created\n- Route files (&#96;__root.tsx&#96;, &#96;index.tsx&#96;)\n- Core utilities (&#96;lib/utils.ts&#96;, &#96;lib/api.ts&#96;)\n- UI store (&#96;stores/uiStore.ts&#96;)\n- i18n setup (&#96;i18n/index.ts&#96;)\n- Global styles with Naqsh design system\n\n✅ **Core Features**\n\n- TanStack Router configured\n- TanStack Query configured\n- Zustand store setup\n- Basic Button component (shadcn/ui pattern)\n- RTL-first HTML structure\n\n## Next Steps\n\n### 1. Install Dependencies\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\ncd packages/web\nnpm install\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### 2. Add Fonts (Optional but Recommended)\n\nPlace font files in &#96;public/fonts/&#96;:\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\npublic/fonts/\n├── vazirmatn/\n│   ├── Vazirmatn-Regular.woff2\n│   ├── Vazirmatn-Medium.woff2\n│   └── Vazirmatn-Bold.woff2\n├── inter/\n│   └── Inter-Variable.woff2\n└── jetbrains-mono/\n    └── JetBrainsMono-Variable.woff2\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\nFonts are already configured in &#96;src/styles/globals.css&#96;. If you don't add\nfonts, the browser will use fallbacks.\n\n### 3. Generate Route Tree\n\nTanStack Router will auto-generate &#96;src/routeTree.gen.ts&#96; on first run. If you\nneed to generate manually:\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\nnpx @tanstack/router-cli generate\n&#96;&#96;&#96;",
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [

        "contents": "interface SidebarItem {\n\n  tabData?: Omit&lt;Tab, 'id' | 'title'&gt;; // Data to create tab\n}\n\nconst SIDEBAR_DATA: SidebarItem[] = [\n  {\n    id: 'dashboard',\n    title: 'Dashboard',\n    icon: &lt;LayoutDashboard className=\"h-4 w-4\" /&gt;,\n    type: 'item',\n    tabData: { type: 'dashboard' },\n  },\n  {\n    id: 'teachers',\n    title: 'Teachers',\n    icon: &lt;Users className=\"h-4 w-4\" /&gt;,\n    type: 'category',\n    children: [\n      {\n        id: 't-1',\n        title: 'All Teachers',\n        type: 'item',\n        tabData: { type: 'teacher', data: { view: 'all' } },\n      },\n      {\n        id: 't-2',\n        title: 'Science Dept',\n        type: 'item',\n        tabData: { type: 'teacher', data: { dept: 'science' } },\n      },\n    ],\n  },\n  {\n    id: 'classes',\n    title: 'Classes',\n    icon: &lt;GraduationCap className=\"h-4 w-4\" /&gt;,\n    type: 'category',\n    children: [\n      { id: 'c-7', title: 'Grade 7', type: 'item', tabData: { type: 'class', data: { grade: 7 } } },\n      { id: 'c-8', title: 'Grade 8', type: 'item', tabData: { type: 'class', data: { grade: 8 } } },\n      { id: 'c-9', title: 'Grade 9', type: 'item', tabData: { type: 'class', data: { grade: 9 } } },\n    ],\n  },\n  {\n    id: 'rooms',\n    title: 'Rooms',\n    icon: &lt;Building2 className=\"h-4 w-4\" /&gt;,\n    type: 'item',\n    tabData: { type: 'room' },\n  },\n  {\n    id: 'subjects',\n    title: 'Subjects'\n,\n];",

      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./packages/web/README.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {},

        "contents": "# Maktab Web Frontend\n\nFrontend application for the Maktab timetable scheduling system.\n\n## Technology Stack\n\n- **React 19.2.3** - UI framework\n- **Vite 7.3.0** - Build tool and dev server\n- **TanStack Router 1.141.6** - Type-safe file-based routing\n- **TanStack Query 5.90.12** - Server state management\n- **Zustand 5.0.9** - Client state management\n- **Tailwind CSS 4.1.18** - Utility-first CSS (RTL-first)\n- **React Hook Form + Zod** - Form validation\n- **@dnd-kit** - Drag-and-drop for schedule editing\n- **react-i18next** - Internationalization\n\n## Getting Started\n\n### Prerequisites\n\n- Node.js 18+ and npm\n- Backend API running on &#96;http://localhost:3000&#96;\n\n### Installation\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\n# Install dependencies\nnpm install\n\n# Start development server\nnpm run dev\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\nThe app will be available at &#96;http://localhost:5173&#96;\n\n### Environment Variables\n\nCreate a &#96;.env&#96; file (see &#96;.env.example&#96;):\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;env\nVITE_API_URL=http://localhost:3000/api\nVITE_APP_VERSION=1.0.0\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n## Project Structure\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\nsrc/\n├── components/        # Reusable UI components\n│   ├── ui/           # shadcn/ui components\n│   ├── layout/       # Shell, Sidebar, Header\n│   └── schedule/     # Schedule grid components\n├── features/         # Feature modules\n│   ├── teachers/\n│   ├── classes/\n│   ├── subjects/\n│   ├── rooms/\n│   ├── timetable/\n│   └── wizard/\n├── hooks/            # Custom React hooks\n├── lib/              # Utilities and API client\n├── routes/           # TanStack Router routes\n├── stores/           # Zustand stores\n├── schemas/          # Zod validation schemas\n├── i18n/             # Translation files\n├── styles/           # Global styles\n└── types/            # TypeScript types\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n## Development\n\n### Available Scripts\n\n- &#96;npm run dev&#96; - Start development server\n- &#96;npm run build&#96; - Build for production\n- &#96;npm run preview&#96; - Preview production build\n- &#96;npm run lint&#96; - Run ESLint\n- &#96;npm run type-check&#96; - Type check without emitting\n\n### Code Style",
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {

            "lineNumber": 6

            "lineNumber": 9

          },

            "text": "- **Zustand 5.0.9** - Client state management",

            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "text": "## Getting Started",
            "lineNumber": 17

          {
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "text": "### Prerequisites",

          },

          },
          {

        "contents": "{\n  \"name\": \"maktab-web\",\n  \"version\": \"1.0.0\",\n  \"type\": \"module\",\n  \"description\": \"Maktab timetable application frontend\",\n  \"scripts\": {\n    \"dev\": \"vite\",\n    \"build\": \"tsc &amp;&amp; vite build\",\n    \"preview\": \"vite preview\",\n    \"lint\": \"eslint . --ext ts,tsx --report-unused-disable-directives --max-warnings 0\",\n    \"type-check\": \"tsc --noEmit\"\n  },\n  \"dependencies\": {\n    \"@dnd-kit/core\": \"^6.3.1\",\n    \"@dnd-kit/sortable\": \"^10.0.0\",\n    \"@dnd-kit/utilities\": \"^3.2.2\",\n    \"@hookform/resolvers\": \"^5.2.2\",\n    \"@radix-ui/react-slot\": \"^1.2.4\",\n    \"@tanstack/react-query\": \"^5.90.12\",\n    \"@tanstack/react-router\": \"^1.141.6\",\n    \"autoprefixer\": \"^10.4.23\",\n    \"class-variance-authority\": \"^0.7.1\",\n    \"clsx\": \"^2.1.1\",\n    \"i18next\": \"^25.7.3\",\n    \"lucide-react\": \"^0.561.0\",\n    \"postcss\": \"^8.5.6\",\n    \"react\": \"^19.2.3\",\n    \"react-dom\": \"^19.2.3\",\n    \"react-hook-form\": \"^7.68.0\",\n    \"react-i18next\": \"^16.5.0\",\n    \"tailwind-merge\": \"^3.4.0\",\n    \"tailwindcss\": \"^4.1.18\",\n    \"tailwindcss-animate\": \"^1.0.7\",\n    \"zod\": \"^4.2.1\",\n    \"zustand\": \"^5.0.9\"\n  },\n  \"devDependencies\": {\n    \"@tailwindcss/postcss\": \"^4.1.18\",\n    \"@tanstack/react-query-devtools\": \"^5.91.1\",\n    \"@tanstack/router-devtools\": \"^1.141.6\",\n    \"@tanstack/router-plugin\": \"^1.141.7\",\n    \"@types/node\": \"^22.16.5\",\n    \"@types/react\": \"^19.2.7\",\n    \"@types/react-dom\": \"^19.2.3\",\n    \"@typescript-eslint/eslint-plugin\": \"^8.0.0\",\n    \"@typescript-eslint/parser\": \"^8.0.0\",\n    \"@vitejs/plugin-react\": \"^5.1.2\",\n    \"eslint\": \"^9.0.0\",\n    \"eslint-config-prettier\": \"^9.1.0\",\n    \"eslint-plugin-react\": \"^7.37.0\",\n    \"eslint-plugin-react-hooks\": \"^5.1.0\",\n    \"tailwindcss-rtl\": \"^0.9.0\",\n    \"typescript\": \"^5.9.3\",\n    \"vite\": \"^7.3.0\"\n  }\n}",

        },
        "contents": "const SIDEBAR_DATA: SidebarItem[] = [\n\n    icon: &lt;Building2 className=\"h-4 w-4\" /&gt;,\n    type: 'item',\n    tabData: { type: 'room' },\n  },\n  {\n    id: 'subjects',\n    title: 'Subjects',\n    icon: &lt;BookOpen className=\"h-4 w-4\" /&gt;,\n    type: 'item',\n    tabData: { type: 'subject' },\n  },\n];\n\nexport const Sidebar = () =&gt; {\n  const { sidebarOpen, addTab } = useUIStore();\n  const [expandedCategories, setExpandedCategories] = useState&lt;Record&lt;string, boolean&gt;&gt;({\n    teachers: true,\n    classes: true,\n  });\n\n  const toggleCategory = (id: string) =&gt; {\n    setExpandedCategories((prev) =&gt; ({ ...prev, [id]: !prev[id] }));\n  };\n\n  const handleItemClick = (item: SidebarItem) =&gt; {\n    if (item.type === 'category') {\n      if (sidebarOpen) {\n        toggleCategory(item.id);\n      }\n    } else {\n      addTab({\n        id: item.id,\n        title: item.title,\n        type: item.tabData?.type || 'dashboard',\n        data: item.tabData?.data,\n      });\n    }\n  };\n\n  return (\n    &lt;aside\n      className={cn(\n        'h-full bg-muted/20 border-e flex flex-col transition-all duration-300 ease-in-out relative z-10',\n        sidebarOpen ? 'w-64' : 'w-14'\n      )}\n    &gt;\n      {/* Search - Only visible when expanded */}\n      &lt;div\n        className={cn('p-4 border-b h-14 flex items-center', !sidebarOpen &amp;&amp; 'justify-center px-0')}\n      &gt;\n        {sidebarOpen ? (\n          &lt;div className=\"relative w-full\"&gt;\n            &lt;Search className=\"absolute left-2.5 top-2.5 h-4 w-4 text-muted-foreground\" /&gt;\n            &lt;input\n              className=\n;",

        "contents": "import { Header } from './Header';\nimport { Sidebar } from './Sidebar';\nimport { TabBar } from './TabBar';\nimport { Workspace } from './Workspace';\n\nexport const MainLayout = () =&gt; {\n  const { rightPanelOpen } = useUIStore();\n\n  return (\n    &lt;div className=\"flex flex-col h-screen w-full bg-background overflow-hidden\"&gt;\n      &lt;Header /&gt;\n\n      &lt;div className=\"flex-1 flex overflow-hidden\"&gt;\n        &lt;Sidebar /&gt;\n\n        &lt;main className=\"flex-1 flex flex-col min-w-0 bg-muted/20\"&gt;\n          &lt;TabBar /&gt;\n          &lt;div className=\"flex-1 flex overflow-hidden relative\"&gt;\n            &lt;Workspace /&gt;\n\n            {/* Right Panel - Inspector */}\n            {rightPanelOpen &amp;&amp; (\n              &lt;div className=\"w-80 border-s bg-background h-full p-4 overflow-auto shrink-0 animate-in slide-in-from-right-10 shadow-lg z-10\"&gt;\n                &lt;h3 className=\"font-semibold text-lg mb-4\"&gt;Inspector&lt;/h3&gt;\n                &lt;div className=\"text-sm text-muted-foreground\"&gt;Select an item to view details.&lt;/div&gt;\n              &lt;/div&gt;\n            )}\n          &lt;/div&gt;\n        &lt;/main&gt;\n      &lt;/div&gt;\n    &lt;/div&gt;\n  );\n};",

(\n                          &lt;ChevronDown className=\"h-3 w-3\" /&gt;\n                        ) : (\n                          &lt;ChevronRight className=\"h-3 w-3\" /&gt;\n                        )}\n                      &lt;/span&gt;\n                    )}\n                  &lt;/&gt;\n                )}\n              &lt;/div&gt;\n\n              {/* Nested Items */}\n              {sidebarOpen &amp;&amp;\n                item.type === 'category' &amp;&amp;\n                expandedCategories[item.id] &amp;&amp;\n                item.children &amp;&amp; (\n                  &lt;ul className=\"mt-1 ml-4 border-l pl-2 space-y-1\"&gt;\n                    {item.children.map((child) =&gt; (\n                      &lt;li key={child.id}&gt;\n                        &lt;div\n                          onClick={() =&gt; handleItemClick(child)}\n                          className=\"flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-1.5 rounded-md cursor-pointer hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground transition-colors\"\n                        &gt;\n                          &lt;span className=\"truncate\"&gt;{child.title}&lt;/span&gt;\n                        &lt;/div&gt;\n                      &lt;/li&gt;\n                    ))}\n                  &lt;/ul&gt;\n                )}\n            &lt;/li&gt;\n          ))}\n        &lt;/ul&gt;\n      &lt;/nav&gt;\n\n      {/* Footer / User Settings */}\n;",

        "contents": "export const Sidebar = \n\" /&gt;\n            &lt;input\n              className=\"w-full bg-background border rounded-md h-9 pl-9 pr-4 text-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary\"\n              placeholder=\"Search...\"\n            /&gt;\n          &lt;/div&gt;\n        ) : (\n          &lt;Button variant=\"ghost\" size=\"icon\"&gt;\n            &lt;Search className=\"h-4 w-4\" /&gt;\n          &lt;/Button&gt;\n        )}\n      &lt;/div&gt;\n\n      {/* Navigation */}\n      &lt;nav className=\"flex-1 overflow-y-auto py-4\"&gt;\n        &lt;ul className=\"space-y-1 px-2\"&gt;\n          {SIDEBAR_DATA.map((item) =&gt; (\n            &lt;li key={item.id}&gt;\n              &lt;div\n                onClick={() =&gt; handleItemClick(item)}\n                className={cn(\n                  'flex items-center gap-3 px-3 py-2 rounded-md cursor-pointer hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground text-sm font-medium transition-colors',\n                  !sidebarOpen &amp;&amp; 'justify-center px-0 py-3'\n                  // Highlight logic could go here\n                )}\n                title={!sidebarOpen ? item.title : undefined}\n              &gt;\n                &lt;span className=\"shrink-0\"&gt;{item.icon}&lt;/span&gt;\n\n                {sidebarOpen &amp;&amp; (\n                  &lt;&gt;\n                    &lt;span className=\"flex-1 truncate\"&gt;{item.title}&lt;/span&gt;\n                    {item.type === 'category' &amp;&amp; (\n                      &lt;span className=\"text-muted-foreground\"&gt;\n                        {expandedCategories[item.id] ?\n          )\n;",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./packages/web/README.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 75
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 130
          }
        },
        "contents": "- &#96;npm run preview&#96; - Preview production build\n- &#96;npm run lint&#96; - Run ESLint\n- &#96;npm run type-check&#96; - Type check without emitting\n\n### Code Style\n\n- Follow &#96;.cursorrules&#96; for AI-assisted development\n- Use Prettier for formatting (auto-format on save)\n- Follow ESLint rules\n- Use RTL-first approach (logical properties in Tailwind)\n\n### Path Aliases\n\nUse path aliases for cleaner imports:\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;typescript\nimport { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';\nimport { useUIStore } from '@/stores/uiStore';\nimport { api } from '@/lib/api';\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n## RTL Support\n\nThe application is RTL-first for Persian/Dari:\n\n- Use logical properties: &#96;ms-4&#96;, &#96;me-4&#96;, &#96;text-start&#96;, etc.\n- Never use &#96;left-*&#96;, &#96;right-*&#96;, &#96;ml-*&#96;, &#96;mr-*&#96; for layout\n- HTML root has &#96;dir=\"rtl\"&#96; and &#96;lang=\"fa\"&#96;\n\n## API Integration\n\nThe API client is configured in &#96;src/lib/api.ts&#96;. Use TanStack Query for data\nfetching:\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;typescript\nimport { useQuery } from '@tanstack/react-query';\nimport { api } from '@/lib/api';\n\nconst { data, isLoading } = useQuery({\n  queryKey: ['teachers'],\n  queryFn: () =&gt; api.teachers.list(),\n});\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n## Building\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\nnpm run build\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\nOutput will be in the &#96;dist/&#96; directory.\n\n## License\n\nMIT",
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "- &#96;npm run preview&#96; - Preview production build",
            "lineNumber": 76
          },
          {
            "text": "- &#96;npm run lint&#96; - Run ESLint",
            "lineNumber": 77
          },
          {
            "text": "- &#96;npm run type-check&#96; - Type check without emitting",
            "lineNumber": 78
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 79
          },
          {
            "text": "### Code Style",
            "lineNumber": 80
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 81
          },
          {
            "text": "- Follow &#96;.cursorrules&#96; for AI-assisted development",
            "lineNumber": 82
          },
          {
            "text": "- Use Prettier for formatting (auto-format on save)",
            "lineNumber": 83
          },
          {
            "text": "- Follow ESLint rules",
            "lineNumber": 84
          },
          {
            "text": "- Use RTL-first approach (logical properties in Tailwind)",
            "lineNumber": 85
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 86
          },
          {
            "text": "### Path Aliases",
            "lineNumber": 87
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 88
          },
          {
            "text": "Use path aliases for cleaner imports:",
            "lineNumber": 89
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 90
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;typescript",
            "lineNumber": 91
          },
          {
            "text": "import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';",
            "lineNumber": 92
          },
          {
            "text": "import { useUIStore } from '@/stores/uiStore';",
            "lineNumber": 93
          },
          {
            "text": "import { api } from '@/lib/api';",
            "lineNumber": 94
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 95
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 96
          },
          {
            "text": "## RTL Support",
            "lineNumber": 97
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 98
          },
          {
            "text": "The application is RTL-first for Persian/Dari:",
            "lineNumber": 99
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 100
          },
          {
            "text": "- Use logical properties: &#96;ms-4&#96;, &#96;me-4&#96;, &#96;text-start&#96;, etc.",
            "lineNumber": 101
          },
          {
            "text": "- Never use &#96;left-*&#96;, &#96;right-*&#96;, &#96;ml-*&#96;, &#96;mr-*&#96; for layout",
            "lineNumber": 102
          },
          {
            "text": "- HTML root has &#96;dir=\"rtl\"&#96; and &#96;lang=\"fa\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 103
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 104
          },
          {
            "text": "## API Integration",
            "lineNumber": 105
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 106
          },
          {
            "text": "The API client is configured in &#96;src/lib/api.ts&#96;. Use TanStack Query for data",
            "lineNumber": 107
          },
          {
            "text": "fetching:",
            "lineNumber": 108
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 109
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;typescript",
            "lineNumber": 110
          },
          {
            "text": "import { useQuery } from '@tanstack/react-query';",
            "lineNumber": 111
          },
          {
            "text": "import { api } from '@/lib/api';",
            "lineNumber": 112
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 113
          },
          {
            "text": "const { data, isLoading } = useQuery({",
            "lineNumber": 114
          },
          {
            "text": "  queryKey: ['teachers'],",
            "lineNumber": 115
          },
          {
            "text": "  queryFn: () =&gt; api.teachers.list(),",
            "lineNumber": 116
          },
          {
            "text": "});",
            "lineNumber": 117
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 118
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 119
          },
          {
            "text": "## Building",
            "lineNumber": 120
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 121
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;bash",
            "lineNumber": 122
          },
          {
            "text": "npm run build",
            "lineNumber": 123
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 124
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 125
          },
          {
            "text": "Output will be in the &#96;dist/&#96; directory.",
            "lineNumber": 126
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 127
          },
          {
            "text": "## License",
            "lineNumber": 128
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 129

          {
            "text": "MIT",
            "lineNumber": 130
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.16821974515914917

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./packages/web/src/stores/uiStore.ts",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 34,
            "column": 1
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 83,
            "column": 4
          }
        },
        "contents": "export const useUIStore = create&lt;UIStore&gt;((set) =&gt; ({\n  // Sidebar\n  sidebarOpen: true,\n  toggleSidebar: () =&gt; set((state) =&gt; ({ sidebarOpen: !state.sidebarOpen })),\n  setSidebarOpen: (open) =&gt; set({ sidebarOpen: open }),\n\n  // Theme &amp; Language\n  theme: 'light',\n  language: 'fa',\n  setTheme: (theme) =&gt; set({ theme }),\n  setLanguage: (language) =&gt; set({ language }),\n\n  // Tabs\n  tabs: [{ id: 'dashboard', title: 'Dashboard', type: 'dashboard' }],\n  activeTabId: 'dashboard',\n  addTab: (tab) =&gt;\n    set((state) =&gt; {\n      const exists = state.tabs.find((t) =&gt; t.id === tab.id);\n      if (exists) {\n        return { activeTabId: tab.id };\n      }\n      return {\n        tabs: [...state.tabs, tab],\n        activeTabId: tab.id,\n      };\n    }),\n  closeTab: (tabId) =&gt;\n    set((state) =&gt; {\n      const newTabs = state.tabs.filter((t) =&gt; t.id !== tabId);\n      // If closing active tab, switch to the last one or null\n      let newActiveId = state.activeTabId;\n      if (state.activeTabId === tabId) {\n        newActiveId = newTabs.length &gt; 0 ? newTabs[newTabs.length - 1].id : null;\n      }\n      return {\n        tabs: newTabs,\n        activeTabId: newActiveId,\n      };\n    }),\n  setActiveTab: (tabId) =&gt; set({ activeTabId: tabId }),\n\n  // Right Panel\n  rightPanelOpen: false,\n  toggleRightPanel: () =&gt; set((state) =&gt; ({ rightPanelOpen: !state.rightPanelOpen })),\n  setRightPanelOpen: (open) =&gt; set({ rightPanelOpen: open }),\n  selectedItemId: null,\n  setSelectedItem: (itemId) =&gt; set({ selectedItemId: itemId, rightPanelOpen: !!itemId }),\n}));",
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "export const useUIStore = create&lt;UIStore&gt;((set) =&gt; ({",
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {

          },
          {

          {

          {

          {

          {

          },
          {

          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 66

          {

            "lineNumber": 67
          },
          {

          },

          },

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 77
          },
          {

          },

        "contents": "import React, { useState } from 'react';\nimport { useUIStore } from '@/stores/uiStore';\nimport { DataGrid, Column } from '@/components/ui/data-grid/DataGrid';\n\n// Mock Data Generators\nconst MOCK_TEACHERS = [\n  { id: '1', name: 'Ahmad', subject: ['Math', 'Physics'], maxHours: '24', active: true },\n  { id: '2', name: 'Sarah', subject: ['English'], maxHours: '20', active: true },\n  { id: '3', name: 'Mahmood', subject: ['History', 'Geography'], maxHours: '22', active: false },\n];\n\nconst MOCK_CLASSES = [\n  { id: '1', name: '7-A', grade: '7', room: '101', students: '32' },\n  { id: '2', name: '7-B', grade: '7', room: '102', students: '30' },\n  { id: '3', name: '8-A', grade: '8', room: '201', students: '35' },\n];\n\nconst DataView = ({ type }: { type: string }) =&gt; {\n  // In a real app, this would come from TanStack Query\n  const [teachers, setTeachers] = useState(MOCK_TEACHERS);\n  const [classes, setClasses] = useState(MOCK_CLASSES);\n\n  if (type === 'teacher') {\n    const columns: Column[] = [\n      { id: 'name', title: 'Full Name', type: 'text', width: '250px' },\n      { id: 'subject', title: 'Qualified Subjects', type: 'tags', width: '300px' },\n      { id: 'maxHours', title: 'Max Hours', type: 'text', width: '100px' },\n      { id: 'active', title: 'Active', type: 'boolean', width: '80px' },\n    ];\n    return (\n      &lt;div className=\"h-full p-4\"&gt;\n        &lt;div className=\"mb-4\"&gt;\n          &lt;h2 className=\"text-2xl font-bold tracking-tight\"&gt;Teachers&lt;/h2&gt;\n          &lt;p className=\"text-muted-foreground\"&gt;Manage teacher profiles and qualifications.&lt;/p&gt;\n        &lt;/div&gt;\n        &lt;div className=\"h-[calc(100%-80px)]\"&gt;\n          &lt;DataGrid columns={columns} data={teachers} onDataChange={setTeachers} /&gt;\n        &lt;/div&gt;\n      &lt;/div&gt;\n    );\n  }\n\n  if (type === 'class')\n;",

        "contents": "/**\n * API client with resource-specific methods\n */\nexport const api = {\n  teachers: {\n    list: () =&gt; fetchAPI&lt;unknown[]&gt;('/teachers'),\n    get: (id: number) =&gt; fetchAPI&lt;unknown&gt;(&#96;/teachers/${id}&#96;),\n    create: (data: unknown) =&gt;\n      fetchAPI&lt;unknown&gt;('/teachers', {\n        method: 'POST',\n        body: JSON.stringify(data),\n      }),\n    update: (id: number, data: unknown) =&gt;\n      fetchAPI&lt;unknown&gt;(&#96;/teachers/${id}&#96;, {\n        method: 'PUT',\n        body: JSON.stringify(data),\n      }),\n    delete: (id: number) =&gt;\n      fetchAPI&lt;void&gt;(&#96;/teachers/${id}&#96;, {\n        method: 'DELETE',\n      }),\n  },\n  subjects: {\n    list: () =&gt;         "contents": "/**\n * API client configuration and utilities\n * @module lib/api\n */\n\nconst API_BASE_URL = import.meta.env.VITE_API_URL || 'http://localhost:3000/api';\n\n/**\n * Base fetch wrapper with error handling\n */\nasync function fetchAPI&lt;T&gt;(endpoint: string, options?: RequestInit): Promise&lt;T&gt; {\n  const url = &#96;${API_BASE_URL}${endpoint}&#96;;\n\n  const response = await fetch(url, {\n    ...options,\n    headers: {\n      'Content-Type': 'application/json',\n      ...options?.headers,\n    },\n  });\n\n  if (!response.ok) {\n    const error = await response.json().catch(() =&gt; ({\n      message: response.statusText,\n    }));\n    throw new Error(error.message || &#96;HTTP error! status: ${response.status}&#96;);\n  }\n\n  return response.json();\n}\n\n/**\n * API client with resource-specific methods\n */\nexport const api = {\n  teachers\n,\n};",

        "contents": "import { cn } from '@/lib/utils';\nimport { useUIStore } from '@/stores/uiStore';\nimport { BookOpen, Building2, GraduationCap, LayoutDashboard, Users, X } from 'lucide-react';\n\nexport const TabBar = () =&gt; {\n  const { tabs, activeTabId, setActiveTab, closeTab } = useUIStore();\n\n  const getIcon = (type: string) =&gt; {\n    switch (type) {\n      case 'dashboard':\n        return &lt;LayoutDashboard className=\"h-3.5 w-3.5\" /&gt;;\n      case 'teacher':\n        return &lt;Users className=\"h-3.5 w-3.5\" /&gt;;\n      case 'class':\n        return &lt;GraduationCap className=\"h-3.5 w-3.5\" /&gt;;\n      case 'room':\n        return &lt;Building2 className=\"h-3.5 w-3.5\" /&gt;;\n      case 'subject':\n        return &lt;BookOpen className=\"h-3.5 w-3.5\" /&gt;;\n      default:\n        return null;\n    }\n  };\n;",
```

```typescript
/* prettier-ignore-start */

/* eslint-disable */

// @ts-nocheck
// noinspection JSUnusedGlobalSymbols

// This file is auto-generated by TanStack Router

// Import Routes

import { Route as rootRoute } from './routes/__root'
import { Route as IndexRoute } from './routes/index'

// Populate the FileRoutesByPath interface

declare module '@tanstack/react-router' {
  interface FileRoutesByPath {
    '/': {
      id: '/'
      path: '/'
      fullPath: '/'
      preLoaderRoute: typeof IndexRoute
      parentRoute: typeof rootRoute
    }
  }
}

// Create and export the route tree

export const routeTree = rootRoute.addChildren({ IndexRoute })

/* prettier-ignore-end */

```

---


Fixed two issues:

1. Missing `Settings` import in Sidebar — added to the imports.
2. CSS import order — moved `@import "tw-animate-css"` before `@plugin`.

Created a basic `routeTree.gen.ts` file. The TanStack Router plugin should regenerate it automatically when the dev server runs.

The React hook error may be due to:
- The route tree not being generated yet
- React 19 compatibility (you're using React 19.2.3)

Try:
1. Restart the dev server — the route tree should regenerate automatically.
2. If the error persists, check for multiple React instances or version mismatches.

The fixes should resolve the CSS error. The React hook error should clear once the route tree is properly generated and the app initializes correctly.

If issues persist after restarting, share the error output and I can investigate further.

_**Agent (model default, mode Agent)**_


The `@import "tw-animate-css"` line is incorrect for Tailwind CSS 4. The `@plugin` directive handles the plugin, so the import isn't needed. Removing it:


---

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="read_file_v2">

```tailwindcss
@import 'tailwindcss';

@plugin 'tailwindcss-animate';
```

</details>

</tool-use>

---


Removed the `@import 'tw-animate-css'` line. In Tailwind CSS 4, `@plugin 'tailwindcss-animate'` is sufficient; the separate import isn't needed and was causing the error.

The CSS should now load correctly. The dev server should pick up the change automatically. If the error persists, restart the dev server.

The React hook error should also be resolved now that the route tree is properly generated and the CSS is loading correctly.

Fixing the component structure: `ReactQueryDevtools` should be inside the router tree, not a sibling of `RouterProvider`. Updating the structure:


---

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="edit_file_v2">

<details><summary>Tool use: **edit_file_v2** • Edit file: /home/ahmadi/Projects/maktab/packages/web/src/main.tsx</summary>

```typescriptreact
const root = document.getElementById('root');
if (!root) {
  throw new Error('Root element not found');
}

createRoot(root).render(
  <StrictMode>
    <QueryClientProvider client={queryClient}>
      <RouterProvider router={router} />
      {import.meta.env.DEV && (
        <ReactQueryDevtools initialIsOpen={false} buttonPosition="bottom-left" />
      )}
    </QueryClientProvider>
  </StrictMode>
);
```

```typescriptreact
import { MainLayout } from '@/components/layout/MainLayout';
import { createRootRoute, Outlet } from '@tanstack/react-router';
import { TanStackRouterDevtools } from '@tanstack/router-devtools';

export const Route = createRootRoute({
  component: RootComponent,
});

function RootComponent() {
  return (
    <>
      <MainLayout />
      {/*
        We keep Outlet here to satisfy the router structure,
        even though our custom IDE layout manages the main view via tabs.
        In a full implementation, we might sync tabs with routes.
      */}
      <div className="hidden">
        <Outlet />
      </div>
      {import.meta.env.DEV && <TanStackRouterDevtools />}
    </>
  );
}
```

</details>

</tool-use>

React 18.3.1 is installed. The "Invalid hook call" error should be resolved.

**Summary of fixes:**
1. Fixed CSS import order — removed the invalid `@import 'tw-animate-css'` line
2. Added missing `Settings` icon import in Sidebar
3. Fixed React version mismatch — downgraded from React 19.2.3 to 18.3.1 to match dependencies
4. Updated React type definitions to match React 18

**Next steps:**
1. Restart your dev server (stop and run `npm run dev` again)
2. The React hook errors should be gone
3. The application should load properly

The issue was a React version mismatch: React 19.2.3 was installed, but many dependencies (like `@tanstack/react-query` and `@tanstack/react-router`) expect React 18, causing multiple React instances and the hook errors. With React 18.3.1 installed, everything should work correctly.
